rationale: The synthetic ensures is `big_conj ==> det_equal`, so the per-state ensures conjuncts are not free hypotheses — that is why the previous attempt's top-level `assert(forall|i| ...)` failed. Wrapping the proof in `if (full_antecedent) { ... }` puts every conjunct in scope, and inside we do the pointwise i==index / i!=index case-split and close with Seq ext-equality.
